# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.

Write secure code.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

const ALLOWED_MODULE_PATTERNS = [
  /^https:\/\/deno\.land\/x\/.+$/,
  /^https:\/\/esm\.sh\/.+$/,
  /^https:\/\/cdn\.skypack\.dev\/.+$/,
  /^https:\/\/cdn\.jsdelivr\.net\/.+$/,
];

const MAX_MODULES = 10;
const MODULE_TIMEOUT = 5000;

interface ModuleConfig {
  path: string;
  name: string;
}

interface LoadedModule {
  name: string;
  module: any;
  error?: string;
}

function isValidModuleUrl(url: string): boolean {
  try {
    const parsedUrl = new URL(url);
    if (parsedUrl.protocol !== "https:") {
      return false;
    }
    return ALLOWED_MODULE_PATTERNS.some((pattern) => pattern.test(url));
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function sanitizeModuleName(name: string): string {
  return name.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, "");
}

function parseModuleConfigs(configString: string): ModuleConfig[] {
  try {
    const configs = JSON.parse(configString);
    if (!Array.isArray(configs)) {
      return [];
    }
    return configs
      .filter(
        (config: any) =>
          config &&
          typeof config === "object" &&
          typeof config.path === "string" &&
          typeof config.name === "string"
      )
      .slice(0, MAX_MODULES)
      .map((config: any) => ({
        path: config.path,
        name: sanitizeModuleName(config.name),
      }));
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

async function loadModuleWithTimeout(
  modulePath: string,
  timeout: number
): Promise<any> {
  const timeoutPromise = new Promise((_, reject) =>
    setTimeout(() => reject(new Error("Module load timeout")), timeout)
  );

  const loadPromise = import(modulePath);

  return Promise.race([loadPromise, timeoutPromise]);
}

async function loadModule(config: ModuleConfig): Promise<LoadedModule> {
  if (!isValidModuleUrl(config.path)) {
    return {
      name: config.name,
      module: null,
      error: "Invalid module URL or not from allowed domain",
    };
  }

  try {
    const module = await loadModuleWithTimeout(config.path, MODULE_TIMEOUT);
    return {
      name: config.name,
      module: module,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    return {
      name: config.name,
      module: null,
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error",
    };
  }
}

async function executeModules(
  modules: LoadedModule[],
  context: any
): Promise<any> {
  const results: Record<string, any> = {};

  for (const loadedModule of modules) {
    if (loadedModule.error) {
      results[loadedModule.name] = { error: loadedModule.error };
      continue;
    }

    try {
      if (
        loadedModule.module &&
        typeof loadedModule.module.default === "function"
      ) {
        const result = await Promise.resolve(
          loadedModule.module.default(context)
        );
        results[loadedModule.name] = result;
      } else if (
        loadedModule.module &&
        typeof loadedModule.module.handler === "function"
      ) {
        const result = await Promise.resolve(
          loadedModule.module.handler(context)
        );
        results[loadedModule.name] = result;
      } else {
        results[loadedModule.name] = {
          error: "Module does not export default function or handler",
        };
      }
    } catch (error) {
      results[loadedModule.name] = {
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Execution error",
      };
    }
  }

  return results;
}

async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  if (url.pathname === "/health") {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ status: "ok" }), {
      headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  if (url.pathname !== "/execute") {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), {
      status: 404,
      headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  let moduleConfigs: ModuleConfig[] = [];

  const envModules = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULES");
  if (envModules) {
    moduleConfigs = parseModuleConfigs(envModules);
  }

  const queryModules = url.searchParams.get("modules");
  if (queryModules) {
    const queryConfigs = parseModuleConfigs(queryModules);
    moduleConfigs = [...moduleConfigs, ...queryConfigs].slice(0, MAX_MODULES);
  }

  if (moduleConfigs.length === 0) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: "No valid module configurations provided" }),
      {
        status: 400,
        headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
      }
    );
  }

  const uniqueConfigs = Array.from(
    new Map(moduleConfigs.map((config) => [config.name, config])).values()
  );

  const loadedModules = await Promise.all(
    uniqueConfigs.map((config) => loadModule(config))
  );

  let requestBody: any = {};
  if (req.method === "POST") {
    try {
      const contentType = req.headers.get("content-type") || "";
      if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
        requestBody = await req.json();
      }
    } catch {
      requestBody = {};
    }
  }

  const context = {
    request: {
      method: req.method,
      url: req.url,
      headers: Object.fromEntries(req.headers.entries()),
      body: requestBody,
    },
    env: {
      get: (key: string) => {
        const allowedKeys = ["DENO_DEPLOYMENT_ID", "DENO_REGION"];
        if (allowedKeys.includes(key)) {
          return Deno.env.get(key);
        }
        return undefined;
      },
    },
  };

  const results = await executeModules(loadedModules, context);

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      modules: uniqueConfigs.map((c) => c.name),
      results: results,
    }),
    {
      headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
    }
  );
}

serve(handler);
